channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Consultant doctor booked under POCSO for alleged sexual assault of minor patient in Haryana hospital
item.description: A serious case has emerged from Kurukshetra, Haryana, where a consultant doctor at Lok Nayak Jai Prakash (LNJP) District Civil Hospital has been accused of sexually assaulting a 15-year-old patient. A...

item.title: Radio executive suspended after inappropriate on-stage contact with presenter at Australian Audio Awards
item.description: A regional Australian radio executive has been stood down after an incident at the Australian Audio Awards in Sydney, where he allegedly made inappropriate physical contact with a colleague on stage i...

item.title: Winter Adventures on the NSW South Coast and Southern Highlands
item.description: The winter 2026 edition of Eat Play Stay invites travellers to explore the NSW South Coast and Southern Highlands during the quieter months. Readers are encouraged to savour the seasonal arrival of tr...

item.title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner wed in intimate London civil ceremony ahead of Italian celebrations
item.description: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner have officially married in a private civil ceremony held at London’s Old Marylebone Town Hall. The couple, who have been in a relationship since January 2024 and became enga...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes portraits of Claudia Cardinale during the filming of 'Circus World' (1964)
item.description: The article showcases a curated set of 35 behind-the-scenes photographs of Italian actress Claudia Cardinale taken during the production of the 1964 adventure film 'Circus World,' directed by Henry Ha...

item.title: Ferrari Luce EV: Market Demand and Industry Updates on Transportation Technology
item.description: TechCrunch Mobility reports on recent developments in the transportation and EV sectors, focusing on Ferrari's new all-electric car, the Luce. Despite negative public reaction and comparisons to lower...

item.title: Jerome Powell emphasizes Federal Reserve independence in speech following Trump tensions
item.description: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell used a public appearance at the John F. Kennedy “Profiles in Courage” award ceremony to underscore the importance of central bank independence, in remarks wi...

item.title: Alberta Prepares for Historic Referendum on Possible Separation from Canada
item.description: Albertans are preparing to vote in a historic referendum on October 19, 2026, which could determine whether the province remains part of Canada or begins the legal process toward separation. Premier D...

item.title: Philippine bail system leaves poor detainees in jail while wealthy accused secure release
item.description: The article examines deep inequalities in the Philippine bail system, highlighting how freedom often depends on a person’s financial capacity rather than the severity of the alleged crime or public sa...

item.title: Heather McComb marries Scott Michael Campbell in Montana months after the death of former husband James Van Der Beek
item.description: Actress Heather McComb has married Scott Michael Campbell in a ceremony held in Missoula, Montana, approximately three months after the death of her former husband, actor James Van Der Beek. McComb, 4...

item.title: Royal Challengers Bengaluru defeat Gujarat Titans to win IPL 2026 final and retain title
item.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) secured the IPL 2026 title with a comprehensive five-wicket win over Gujarat Titans (GT) in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, successfully defendin...

item.title: Government ramps up border security while challenges persist ahead of June 30 deadline
item.description: South Africa's government has introduced new border security measures in response to ongoing concerns about illegal immigration and contraband smuggling. Following a major drug bust at the Beitbridge ...

item.title: Nationals Celebrate Series Win Over Padres with Key Player Highlights
item.description: The Washington Nationals continued their winning streak with a 4-2 victory against the San Diego Padres on Sunday. The team’s clubhouse was filled with celebratory energy as players and staff acknowle...

item.title: Reports claim Iran's president offered resignation amid tensions over IRGC influence, but officials deny it
item.description: Reports published by Iran International claimed that Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian had submitted a resignation letter because he believed he could no longer effectively govern while the Islamic ...

item.title: Mexican President Condemns U.S. Legal Action Against Domestic Officials as Political Interference
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum has sharply criticised the United States, accusing it of interfering in Mexico’s internal politics following the indictment of ten Mexican officials, including Sina...

item.title: Tamil Nadu government finalising White Paper on state finances amid fiscal concerns and policy commitments
item.description: The Tamil Nadu government is in the final stages of preparing a White Paper on the State’s finances, which is expected to be released within a few days. According to senior officials, the document is ...

item.title: Davido calls on Nigerian entertainers to speak up about rising insecurity and government critique
item.description: Davido, a prominent Nigerian musician, has urged fellow entertainers to use their platforms to address the worsening insecurity in Nigeria. He admitted that performers, including himself, have not spo...

item.title: Abelardo de la Espriella and Iván Cepeda Advance to Colombia’s Presidential Runoff After First-Round Vote
item.description: Colombia’s 2026 presidential election will proceed to a runoff on June 21 after no candidate secured an outright majority in the first round. With more than 99% of votes counted, right-wing outsider A...

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile advances SA–India cooperation through trade, technology and investment initiatives
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile is undertaking a working visit to India from 29 May to 3 June 2026, aimed at deepening diplomatic, economic and strategic relations between South Africa and India. Duri...

item.title: Australian Home Affairs in discussions over sharing citizens’ biometric data with the US
item.description: The Department of Home Affairs has publicly confirmed that it is in discussions with the US government regarding the sharing of Australians’ biometric data. This follows demands from the United States...
